chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-160 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 13-05-2024 Applicant present in person. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G a/w SIP Jameel Ahmed on behalf of SSP, Khairpur & SIP Aurangzeb of P.S, B-section, Khairpur. ***** It is stated by learned Additional P.G that FIR of the applicant has been registered being Crime No.174 of 2024 at P.S, B-section, Khairpur. Hence, this application has served its purpose. Applicant present in person has confirmed this fact. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application is disposed of having served its purpose. JUDGE Ahmad
